rules.rule: Variable names must be full English words — no abbreviations.
Collection variables must be named with the plural form of the element type.
Variable names must not embed the type (no List, Array, Obj suffixes).
Use var when the declared type is immediately obvious from the right-hand side.
Use the explicit type when the right-hand side does not make the type immediately obvious.
When a variable declaration exceeds 120 characters, the right-hand side must be broken to the next line and indented by one level.
Logically distinct groups of variable declarations must be separated by exactly one blank line.
A null or default placeholder variable must be named maybe{Entity} (e.g., maybeStudent).
Multiple variables must not be declared on the same line.
